summary: Completed backend-only testing of AI Trading Bot Node.js/Express API. All 23 tests passed (100% success rate). Tested all 5 route modules: settings, portfolio, news, trading, upstox.
critical_code_review_comments: All tested endpoints working correctly with proper response structures
Risk validation working - daily_limit vs max_per_trade and min threshold checks pass
Demo news mode working correctly since no external API keys configured (expected)
AI sentiment analysis falls back to NEUTRAL when no emergent_llm_key configured (expected)
Upstox endpoints return appropriate error messages without broker credentials (expected)
Full trading pipeline working: initialize -> fetch news -> generate signal -> execute trade -> auto-exit
seed_data_creation: Test pipeline injects high-confidence news for trade generation testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Node.js/Express backend fully tested. All routes working: settings (3 endpoints), portfolio (4 endpoints), news (2 endpoints), trading (8 endpoints), upstox (2 tested). Full pipeline test validates: initialize -> fetch news -> inject high-confidence news -> generate trade -> verify signal and trade created -> auto-exit check. MOCKED: News articles (demo mode), AI sentiment (NEUTRAL fallback), Market prices (simulated), Upstox connection (disconnected without token).

tested_features.settings_get: PASS - GET /api/settings returns default settings with all config sections
tested_features.settings_update: PASS - POST /api/settings/update performs deep merge correctly
tested_features.trading_status: PASS - GET /api/settings/trading-status checks schedule and returns allowed/reason
tested_features.initialize: PASS - POST /api/initialize creates portfolio with initial capital
tested_features.portfolio: PASS - GET /api/portfolio returns capital, value, P&L, trades count
tested_features.combined_status: PASS - GET /api/combined-status returns PAPER mode with upstox_connected=false
tested_features.news_fetch: PASS - GET /api/news/fetch returns 5 demo articles with NEUTRAL sentiment (no AI key)
tested_features.news_latest: PASS - GET /api/news/latest returns stored news sorted by created_at
tested_features.signals_latest: PASS - GET /api/signals/latest returns signals sorted by date
tested_features.signals_active: PASS - GET /api/signals/active filters to ACTIVE status only
tested_features.trades_active: PASS - GET /api/trades/active returns open trades with simulated live P&L
tested_features.trades_today: PASS - GET /api/trades/today returns today's trade count and P&L summary
tested_features.trades_history: PASS - GET /api/trades/history returns all trades sorted by entry_time
tested_features.auto_exit_check: PASS - POST /api/auto-exit/check processes open trades for target/stoploss exits
tested_features.auto_settings_update: PASS - POST /api/auto-settings/update updates auto_exit, auto_entry, target_pct
tested_features.auto_settings_get: PASS - GET /api/auto-settings returns current auto-trading configuration
tested_features.generate_trade: PASS - POST /api/test/generate-trade creates signal and trade from latest news
tested_features.upstox_auth_url: PASS - GET /api/upstox/auth-url returns error when API Key/Redirect URI not configured
tested_features.upstox_connection: PASS - GET /api/upstox/connection returns disconnected without access token
tested_features.full_pipeline: PASS - Complete flow: initialize -> news -> signal -> trade -> auto-exit
